trade.summary: Brasile exports soybeans, iron ore, corn, beef, and crude oil to Giappone. Giappone exports vehicles, machinery, electronics, and chemicals to Brasile. Giappone is one of Brasile's top export destinations in Asia.

diplomatic.summary: Brasile and Giappone have exceptionally warm ties rooted in the massive Giapponeese immigration to Brasile — Brasile hosts the largest Giapponeese diaspora outside Giappone (~1.5 million). Regular bilateral summits, cultural exchanges, and strong people-to-people ties.

military.summary: No military alliance. Giappone's pacifist constitution limits military cooperation. Some naval contact and interest in Brasileian defense procurement. Giappone has supplied surveillance aircraft to Brasile.

financial.summary: Giappone is a significant investor in Brasile, particularly in agriculture, automotive, and manufacturing. JBIC and JICA have financed major Brasileian infrastructure projects. Giapponeese companies including Toyota, Honda, and Mitsubishi have major operations in Brasile.

energy.summary: Giappone imports Brasileian crude oil and ethanol. JBIC has funded Brasileian energy projects. Cooperation on offshore oil technology. Giappone interested in Brasileian hydrogen exports.

scientific.summary: Strong scientific cooperation. JICA supports agricultural and environmental research in Brasile. Joint programs in agronomy (PRODECER legacy), biodiversity, and materials science. Large Nikkei-Brasileian academic community bridges both countries.
